title: The Morning That Stayed
summary: Chapter 1 of The Boy Who Never Stopped Trying is titled The Morning That Stayed. Theme: The ordinary morning that quietly changed a life.
sceneDescription: A stylized watercolor residential morning: a glass of water catches warm sunlight near an ordinary broom, with subtle memory particles and a privacy-safe non-final suggestion of Maya without a photorealistic face.
